name: Li Auto Inc.
description: Li Auto Inc. is a leader in China's new energy vehicle market. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and sells premium smart electric vehicles. Through innovations in product, technology, and business model, the company provides families with safe, convenient, and comfortable products and services. Li Auto is a pioneer in successfully commercializing extended-range electric vehicles in China. It leverages technology to create value for its users, focusing on its proprietary range extension system, next-generation electric vehicle technologies, and smart vehicle solutions.

investment_theses.company_type: Chinese Electric Vehicle Manufacturer / Extended-Range EVs
